rationale: This is a Playrix-style domestic slapstick fail hook (cat startles butler) built for casual puzzle/decor audiences skewing female 30+ — almost zero overlap with Crazy Kick's male 8-30 sports-arcade audience. The 3D-render interior palette and character archetypes clash with the bright stadium/stickman low-poly look, and the "fail" hook has no natural bridge to swipe-to-shoot soccer mechanics without a forced and likely deceptive pivot. Skip unless you can rebuild the concept around a goalkeeper/defender fail moment that ties directly into a shooting gameplay reveal.
